# botyard_mcp_servers (Data Source)

Lists the organization's MCP servers (both container-image and managed-remote runtimes).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List the organization's MCP servers for discovery.
data "botyard_mcp_servers" "all" {}

output "mcp_server_slugs" {
  value = [for s in data.botyard_mcp_servers.all.mcp_servers : s.slug]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `mcp_servers` (Attributes List) All MCP servers in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mcp_servers))

<a id="nestedatt--mcp_servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mcp_servers`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Unique MCP server identifier (UUID).
- `name` (String) Human-readable label.
- `runtime_kind` (String) Runtime kind — `container_image` or `managed_remote`.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe unique-per-org identifier.
